<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band11_chunk001.pdf#page=5 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band11 p8 -->


[[File:Band11_chunk001_p005_img001.jpg|thumb|Die Landkreise Ebersberg, Traunstein und Berchtesgadener Land]]



== INHAL ==
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band11 p9 -->
